title: scopolia lunaria
intro: Scopolia lunaria, also known as devil's trumpet, is a flowering plant native to North America that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, particularly scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have medicinal properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Scopolia lunaria are often used to treat digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, as well as to alleviate pain and spasms. Herbal preparations of Scopolia lunaria can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality.
